narrative:
Cols 78-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 757 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
